issues.title: Severe Water Main Leakage
issues.description: Clean water is actively bubbling up through the asphalt near the sidewalk, creating a large, deep puddle that blocks pedestrian access and is starting to erode the curb. Spanning about 15 feet across Chandigarh's busy Madhya Marg.

comments.text: This is getting worse. Water has been running like this since yesterday morning.

issues.title: Deep Double Pothole on Jan Marg
issues.description: Two extremely deep potholes are aligned right in the middle of the driving lane. They are about 8 inches deep and have already damaged several rims of vehicles passing by. Highly dangerous for cyclists touring Sector 16.
issues.locationName: Jan Marg, Sector 16 (opp. Rose Garden), Chandigarh

comments.text: My friend popped her tire on this exact spot last night. Be careful!

issues.title: Damaged Streetlight Near Shanti Path Playground
issues.description: The streetlight fixture on pole #12-CH is completely shattered, and wires are hanging down (though covered). The entire play area of Sector 22-B park is pitch dark after 6 PM, creating a safety issue for kids.

authorityAction.note: Chandigarh Municipal Corporation (MCC) Crew has been dispatched to install a new LED fixture and tuck away hanging cables. Scheduled completion is within 48 hours.

issues.title: Illegal Dumping / Overflowing Garbage Bin
issues.description: Someone dumped a large mattress, three wooden pallets, and several bags of construction debris right next to the municipal garbage cans, fully blocking the Sector 22 sidewalk and attracting rodents.

authorityAction.note: Chandigarh Municipal Corporation (MCC) Clean Team has picked up the debris and swept the sidewalk. Issue resolved.

comments.text: Thank you for reporting. Our clean team resolved this on Tuesday.

hotspots.title: Water Main Corrosion Cluster
hotspots.reasoning: Frequent low-volume reports combined with ancient cast-iron pipe layouts in the Madhya Marg corridor suggest systemic pressure fatigue.
hotspots.recommendation: Priority ultrasonic pipe inspection and pressure-reducing valve adjustment.

hotspots.title: Arterial Road Wear Corridor
hotspots.reasoning: High heavy-vehicle turning volume paired with current double potholes indicates accelerated asphalt crumbling along the bus route near Sector 16.
hotspots.recommendation: Full lane milling and resurfacing rather than localized cold-patches.
